key_decisions.original_text: EIP-8282 added as CFI to Glamsterdam; no objections raised on call
EIP-7928 soft-committed using Tony's proposal as default; teams to review Dragon's alternative async; final decision by end of week to meet devnet-6 Monday test deadline
EIP-7937 state gas refund and Create charging changes merged; spec for devnet-6
EIP-7645 (alias ORIGIN to SENDER) CFI'd to Hegota; EIP-8304 (Trustless Log Index) PFI'd to Hegota
